updates.tweet_text: Closing update: Almost at 7390 final target in #ES_F and this took its time. Last night longs triggered on the Failed Breakdown of Tuesday's 7247 low. Today's plan posted hourly: Hold runner. Targets were 7327, 7336, 7358, 7390. 7425+ above. Newsletter out soon with next entry

updates.tweet_text:
For those new to the Failed Breakdown system, today was textbook. Last night at 730pm, we got long on an A+ Failed Breakdown of 7247 Tuesday low. Institutional accumulation event. Today's target was 7390, hit &we are now +165.

Ride runner for 7425, 7477+. Newsletter just sent https://t.co/UcpM2VymoK
updates.notes: All referenced levels (7247, 7390, 7420/7425≈7420, 7477≈7478) are reaffirmations of morning-plan levels; no genuinely new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: Note: And as I emphasize, this is all I trade. I do not short, I do not trade chop, I do not flip back and forth. I simply wait on this one setup every single day and everyday this week has seen at least 1 Failed Breakdown, most going 100+ points.
updates.notes: No price levels mentioned at all; tweet is purely methodological commentary about trading style and FBD setup frequency.

updates.tweet_text: @Camp_Nouuu Yes they make it very obvious when they accumulate. I just follow them in! Then later on we see what headline they were front running as its often insiders

updates.tweet_text:
Best longs in months keeps paying in #ES_F, all given in advance. 730pm Wednesday we got a Failed Breakdown of Tuesday's 7247 daily low. Institutional accumulation event. Targets were 7390, 7425 (hit). +200 points

Plan: Ride runner. 7458, 7474, 7507 next. 7410, 7390=supports https://t.co/xDDte8Qkzq

updates.tweet_text: Note: Unfortunately, now that we are +200 we just ride runner and there is 0 to trade. After a massive institutional accumulation event like Wednesday evening (we followed them in), institutions often don't go back to accumulation for several days. Just let the runner work.
updates.notes: Pure trade management commentary — no actionable price named, just instructions to hold runner after institutional accumulation event.

updates.tweet_text: @1chotch I write a whole newsletter on this topic, far too much to explain in a tweet. My edge is specifically though I only long when institutions do and they make it extremely clear when they do so
updates.notes: Reply tweet explaining trading philosophy/edge; no price levels mentioned whatsoever.
